creator: @zackmason.fitness
transcript: Bro, you wanna go to Outback? Okay, yeah, I'll get the eight ounce center cut sirloin with the loaded mashed potatoes. I was thinking more like seafood. Oh yeah, love seafood. Okay, so I'll get the shrimp on the barbie with the asparagus.
caption: Share this for someone on a weight loss journey! Steak and Potatoes - 610 calories | 54g Protein. Shrimp on the Barbie - 670 Calories | 58g Protein. #fyp #weightloss #foryou #weightlosstransformation #motivation #overweight #gymtok #diet #outback
